capability: the novelty reserve tracks the recent novelty rate
claim: the probability reserved for an unseen atom (forwardDist().reserve), and the surprise assigned to a genuine newcomer, should be high right after a burst of newcomers and low after a confirmation run — not a function of total mass alone
stimulus_shape: matched recent/early/confirm conditions with total gamma-mass held identical; recency isolated from cumulative count (recent & early share distinct-count); probe newcomer scored under the forward reserve; two senses
mechanism: noveltyAmplitude(firstSeen, now, {gamma}) = sum gamma^(now-1-firstSeen) — the gamma-decayed count of first-appearances — fed as the `novelty` amplitude into the UNCHANGED forwardDist/surpriseAt. Context enters at the amplitude; the Born step (the KL normalization) is fixed and identical for every sense.
fix_layer: interior: src/core/surprise.js (new noveltyAmplitude helper, exported from the genome) + src/perceiver/reading.js (figure + proposition reserve amplitudes), gated by SIGNAL_RESERVE (env RULES_REV or NOVELTY_RATE) and an explicit opts.signalReserve
scope_holds: text-proposition basis and tonal-pitch basis (interior); production readingAt under the flag/opt (liveness verified at the value level)
scope_changes: GATED off-by-default. Flag-on, 6 existing tests diverge because they encode the constant-reserve protention: bayes #33 (the same newcomer 'costs more' in a committed cast — REVERSES, because that cast had a high recent newcomer rate, the exact 'failing to learn from its own signal' bug); bayes #36 (REC band-calibration over a now front-loaded distribution — the bayes signal is sharper, not numb: peak 0.279 on the FIRST turnover vs 0.152, then decays as the rate is learned); battery #318 (shuffle-vs-ordered margin shrinks — the rate reserve is slightly more shuffle-robust); predict #384 (predictor-vs-recurrence accuracy margin flips by ~0.015); write-answer #569 (frame-walk value shift); surprise #504 (exact-value golden moves by design). The shipped (flag-off) path is byte-identical. Promoting to default requires reconciling these — future work.
regression_lock: tests/novelty-rate-reserve.test.js (7 assertions: control flat, tracked order, recency-not-count, two-sense interior, absolute continuity, production wiring, default-path golden)
parity: 649 existing tests byte-identical with the flag off; +7 locks; 656 green
